About Contact
Resume

Attention is currency.
I make things that earn it.

Hello, I'm Sreenidhi. I'm a designer interested in how technology, business, and culture shape each other, and how design works between them.

↳ Let's Talk View work

Work

A selection of recent work across product design, brand systems, and interactions, made for software and consumer products.

  1. Atelia
  2. Whering
  3. Golden Group
  4. Tofha
  5. SKU Coverage

Creative Coding

Visual experiments built in code. Shaders, animations, and small interactive sketches around motion and form.

Project Description
Cloud Nine Interactive Shader ↗ Horsin' Around Needlework Animation ↗ Interactive Globe Claude Code Experiment ↗

Play

An open corner for side projects and rabbitholes. Half-finished experiments and ideas I keep coming back to.

Statewatch Formalism Tool
Panic! at the Party An agent-based simulation of what makes community apps catch fire, or collapse.
Duolingo Streak Mechanic Machinations
Essays Writing
TOOLS I USE
TESTIMONIALS
“

Honestly one of the best people to talk design with. Sreenidhi will say something offhand that I'll end up thinking about a week later. She'll go from a tiny interaction detail to the bigger product point it sits inside without skipping a beat.

Working with Sreenidhi across multiple design projects has been a genuine pleasure. She's exceptionally talented, executes with speed and clarity, and brings the kind of design knowledge that's contagious to everyone around her. I learned a lot just by being in the same room as her. Any team would be lucky to have her.

Sreenidhi just gets design and engineering, both of them. That made working on Tofha together so much easier. She'd be thinking about how something should feel and how it should actually be built at the same time, not as two separate problems. We ended up with a site that feels like a natural extension of how our brand already lives on Instagram. I'd work with her again in a heartbeat.

Akansha Soni
